segments.original_text: そしてダウンしてしまったので

segments.text: But at least he got out cheap
segments.original_text: だがまあ安く済んだほうでしょ

segments.text: The throws aren't really insane or anything
segments.original_text: 投げがそうそうやばいっすけど

segments.text: His spacing got a bit sloppy maybe
segments.original_text: ほかほかがちょっと悪さしたか

segments.text: That was definitely a tricky percent
segments.original_text: 難しそうなパーセントではあったかも

full_text: Whoa, he got out! And he's knocked down But at least he got out cheap The throws aren't really insane or anything Though they ARE insane... His spacing got a bit sloppy maybe That was definitely a tricky percent Now at the ledge Way too close!
